Name: Ohh Deer | Playful Paper Goods | B Corp
Description:
Founded in 2011 by partners Jamie Mitchell and Mark Callaby, Ohh Deer is an LGBTQ+ owned business known for its playful greeting cards, stationery, and gifts. With a focus on creativity and unique design, we sell our products globally through independent retailers and major national stores.

In 2024, we launched Kaleido, our luxury stationery brand, expanding our product offering and reinforcing our position as innovators in the stationery world.

We’re passionate about what we do and committed to giving back. Since our inception, we’ve planted over 150,000 trees through our charity partners and supported causes close to our hearts, including Switchboard LGBT, The Butterfly Conservation, and Battersea Dogs and Cats Home. Our efforts to make a positive impact extend across all that we do.

In August 2024, we proudly became a Certified B Corporation, meeting rigorous standards of social and environmental performance, accountability, and transparency. This certification affirms our ongoing commitment to using business as a force for good, ensuring we create value for both our customers and the planet.

Our co-founder, Mark Callaby, also contributes to the greeting card industry by serving on the UK Greeting Card Association board, where he leads the Diversity and Inclusion sub-committee.

We work with over 100 talented artists worldwide, including V&A, Laura Ashley, Gemma Correll, Hello!Lucky, Cath Kidston, Steven Rhodes, Melanie Johnsson, Hartland, Ken the Cat, Twin Pines, Up With Paper, and many more. Each collaboration brings fresh creativity, ensuring Ohh Deer continues to deliver original, high-quality designs that resonate with our customers.

Name: Blake Envelopes & Packaging
Description:
We are Blake, market leaders in the world of envelopes and postal packaging, distributing our brands to over 45 countries worldwide…
 
Starting with nothing more than a desk and phone in our CEO’s attic space, Blake has grown every year, and today over 2 billion Blake products drop through mailboxes across the globe every day!

Our diversification extends to anything that ‘envelops’ your product…

Many view the envelope as a product of the past used for letters and mail, however we view the envelope of the present and the future; as an ‘eCommerce transportation tool’. It provides a solution which is alternative to plastic and, by its very construction and sizing, removes the consumer frustration of ‘overpacking’. This, combined with its ability to go through a mailbox, gives the most cost effective and secure method of delivering your eCommerce!

We pride ourselves in being a sustainably sound business and have always been passionate about caring for the environment we live in. This is why we offer a wide range of recycled envelopes, not to mention our wonderful plastic-free Vita range which provides a paper alternative to any plastic eCommerce postal solution and helps to keep our rivers, coastlines and oceans clear of plastic pollution.

Something closely linked with the envelopes we sell, literacy has always been very important to us at Blake. We recognise the difference a good education makes to every child’s future and so we created our “Giving Hope Through Education” program to fund and donate learning supplies to children in poor and deprived circumstances who wouldn’t otherwise have this chance.

Visit foundation.blake-envelopes.com to find out more!

Blake is different; positively different and creatively different.

Name: Papeles y Corrugados Andina    SA
Description:
PAPELES Y CORRUGADOS ANDINA S.A. , es una empresa dedicada a la fabricación y comercialización de soluciones de empaque de cartón corrugado, que incursionó  en el mercado nacional papelero en el año 1995.  Nuestra planta tiene un área total de 67.200 m², conformada por dos plantas de producción independientes.

Nuestra compañía contribuye con el desarrollo del país y principalmente de la región  generando empleo en  cinco (5)  municipios de Cundinamarca (Sesquilé, Tocancipá, Gachancipá, Suesca,  Zipaquirá) , y la ciudad de Bogotá.

 

PAPELES Y CORRUGADOS ANDINA S.A, es una empresa certificada en ISO 9001 versión 2015 por Bureau Veritas Certification y cuenta con el reconocimiento de Compromiso de Responsabilidad Social, expedido por la Coorporación Fenalco Solidario Colombia.

Name: PACAPROD SAS
Description:
PACAPROD, c’est de la création 100% française autour du message, du lien et du cadeau.

PME familiale 3ème génération qui a su garder sa dimension humaine, la société compte actuellement plus de 65 salariés, dont 30 commerciaux et plus de 200 merchandiseurs présents sur toute la France et le Luxembourg pour une gestion optimale des linéaires.

Créativité, Réactivité & Passion du métier, sont les principales caractéristiques de notre équipe, le tout dans une démarche éco-responsable.

Tout a commencé en 1943, avec une chambre photographique, un sac à dos version XXL, une 2 CV rouge et une passion fervente pour la photographie. 

C’est ainsi qu’André Béguin démarre son entreprise, à l’époque spécialisée dans la commercialisation des légendaires cartes postales, souvenir irremplaçable du vacancier. 

Puis, sa fille et son gendre font vivre le rêve en plus grand en créant et commercialisant des Cartes de Vœux pour tous les évènements de la vie ainsi que de l’Emballage Cadeaux. 

L’entreprise devient alors petit à petit l’un des fournisseurs privilégié de la grande distribution française sous le nom de PACAPROD SAS.

Name: Ecofibras Ponderosa
Description:
Ecofibras Ponderosa inició operaciones en el año 1979, en Azcapotzalco Distrito Federal actualmente Ciudad de México, como parte del “Grupo Chihuahua”, bajo la razón social de SERPASA S.A. DE C.V. El objetivo desde entonces se consolidó en crear un departamento para el abastecimiento de fibras de papel y cartón para Cartones Ponderosa.

En 1994 Grupo Pulsar Internacional adquiere la empresa; y el 18 de Enero de 1996 decide cambiar la razón social a como actualmente está constituida Ecofibras Ponderosa S.A. de C.V.

El objetivo de garantizar el suministro de fibra secundaria de papel y cartón a Cartones Ponderosa, siguió en pie por lo que  se estableció una infraestructura que le permitiera estar en condiciones de participar activamente en el mercado nacional de fibra secundaria, para lo cual conformó la red de Centros de recolección, selección y empaque de fibra secundaria más importante del país.

En el año 2001 Organización Editorial Mexicana adquiere el 100% de su infraestructura de operación, incluyendo a Cartones Ponderosa, los centros de distribución, transportes y los centros de captación de Ecofibras Ponderosa, misma que hasta el momento nos sigue respaldando a nivel nacional, y con un nuevo reto de abastecimiento de fibra secundaria ya que también adquiere Productora Nacional de Papel en esa época.

Actualmente contamos con 13 Centros de recolección a nivel nacional, ubicados estratégicamente en las principales ciudades del país.

Name: Envelopes.com
Description:
From our start in 1971 as Action Envelope, a Queens, NY envelope printing company, founder Ken Newman served a local clientele of about 100. Today we are Envelopes.com; a leading ecommerce business touching millions.

We focus on one thing: to provide the largest in-stock selection of sizes, styles, and colors to ensure customers find the perfect product for their unique needs. We combine this with quick shipments, quality printing, and great customer service to ensure total customer satisfaction.

The company experienced many changes before its' huge expansion and exciting sucess - but it wasn't always good times. Upon Ken's sudden death in 1993, his wife Sharon Newman took over the company. With 3 young children, her goal was to support her family and give her son, Seth, the opportunity to join the family business as he always wanted. Seth Newman officially joined the company in 1998 and shifted the focus of the company to the internet, launching the company's first website soon after. These changes (and many others), combined with the expanding team of dedicated and well-trained employees have given Envelopes.com the power to become the No. 1 envelope company - being recognized as a Top 1000 Internet Retailer, and Inc. 5000 fastest growing company for multiple years.

Today, the 48-year young Envelopes.com has grown into the ecommerce collective BIGNAME Commerce - which includes our newest brand Folders.com and will continue to grow with other new brands, like Bags.com.

Name: Creative Paper Mills Ltd.
Description:
Welcome to Creative Paper Mills Ltd. (CPML), where excellence meets environmental consciousness. Our exceptional products are meticulously crafted using 100% Virgin Pulp, a testament to our commitment to quality and sustainability.

Our cutting-edge technology, guided by the expertise of our skilled professionals, ensures that every sheet of paper is a masterpiece in itself. Join us at Creative Paper Mills Ltd., where quality, innovation, and environmental stewardship converge to redefine what paper can be.

Name: Pentapack srl
Description:
La nostra azienda nasce dall’idea di voler creare una realtà sempre più completa, innovativa e dinamica nell’offerta di articoli per i settori dell’imballaggio alimentare, industriale e del commercio in genere.

Nel 2003 il progetto prende vita con la scissione del ramo d’azienda della storica Lenoci & De Peverelli, che già operava nel settore degli imballaggi dal 1957, dando modo alla nuova società Pentapack packaging solutions di specializzarsi per soddisfare le esigenze di un mercato in continua evoluzione.

La minuziosa ricerca della qualità del prodotto e della massima soddisfazione del cliente in termini di collaborazione, affiancamento tecnico e del servizio offerto ci ha permesso di ottenere la leadership all’interno del territorio valtellinese, ulteriormente consolidata dall’acquisizione di un’azienda concorrente.

L’affermazione in ambito locale ci ha spinti ad allargare i nostri orizzonti verso il Lago di Como e tutta la Brianza rilevando una nota azienda della provincia di Lecco.

Nel 2025 abbiamo concluso un’importantissima acquisizione, rilevando la storica Cisa Pack, azienda con sede a Segrate e operante sulla città e l’hinterland di Milano.

Attualmente operiamo con tre sedi, la principale a Castione Andevenno (SO) e le filiali ad Olginate (LC) e a Segrate (MI). Ci avvaliamo di un gruppo di lavoro composto da 37 collaboratori tra titolari, dipendenti ed agenti.

Punto di forza della nostra azienda è il Consorzio Union Cart di cui Roberto Lenoci è socio fondatore nonchè attuale Presidente. Grazie al Consorzio, formato da 21 aziende tra cui un produttore di primissimo livello nazionale, dislocate sull’intero territorio italiano possiamo costantemente monitorare l’evoluzione del prodotto e confrontarci con diverse realtà arricchendo il nostro bagaglio tecnico e di conseguenza riuscendo a fornire una consulenza sempre migliore alla nostra clientela.

"We Consciously Care."
It’s more than a statement. It’s our philosophy.

At S.R. Papers Pvt. Ltd., every decision is guided by care.

For over two decades, we’ve turned tissues into more than a product.

 Because when it comes to hygiene, SR Papers consciously cares for every touchpoint that matters to your business.

Name: Sky Goodies
Description:
Sky Goodies is a brand of paper products, founded in 2013 by Amit Gudibanda and Misha Gudibanda, both designers by profession and artists at heart. We make products that help people of all ages and cultures discover the joy of ‘Making’. 

We want to make everyone - people of all ages - play. Every day. Find joy in little hand-made things. Our paper products are often vintage-inspired and whimsical with varied uses. Everything we make under Sky Goodies must qualify as a ‘goody’; something that looks delicious, or brings a bit of joy to everyday life. Patterns and colors are very Indian, and Truck Art is a big inspiration for many of the colorful products. Our best-seller typewriter calendars are popular among all age groups, both men and women. All our DIY products are great for kids, as they encourage creativity, and hone their logic and motor skills. The DIYs make great social and indoor activities, both in homes and offices. 

Sky Goodies’ products have been featured across the world in top design and art blogs, namely, babble.com, colossal.com, mentalfloss.com, buzzfeed.com, huffingtonpost, papercrave.com, etsy.com, etc. We have also been featured in print by premier magazines like Vogue Magazine, Brand Magazine (Shanghai), Lonely Planet Magazine, Elle Decor Magazine, Printing Friends Magazine (Sweden) and local newspapers in India. We are fortunate to have received over 1000 5-Star reviews from our customers across the world. (https://www.etsy.com/in-en/shop/SkyGoodies/reviews) 

All designs are original creations by the Sky Goodies team, and are the copyright and perpetual intellectual property of Sky Goodies Products and Applications Private Limited. Sky Goodies is owned and managed by its directors, Amit Gudibanda and Misha Gudibanda. All Sky Goodies’ products are designed by hand with love, in Mumbai, India. They are available worldwide through www.skygoodies.co.

Name: Butterfly & Bow
Description:
A scientifically proven method, for achieving goals, is to write them down. 
By writing things down that are important to you, you are:

   Creating a step-by-step action plan
   Clarifying your desires
   Developing visual cues (aka a reminder)
   Boosting motivation to take action
   Activating right and left-brain hemispheres stimulating a new realm of 
        consciousness
   42% more likely to achieve goals if done regularly

The Ph.ME! Plan provides a collection of cards, available in a variety of designs, that guide individuals to pursue a life they are excited about LIVING, rather than merely existing in. Think of them as To Do Lists of things you WANT to do - a GET To Do List!

 Master Your Life: Earn the Ultimate Degree in YOU and Live with Purpose, Happiness, and Discovery was written as a guide to help individuals break free from the shackles of monotony and embrace a life of purpose and passion. 

From overcoming procrastination to cultivating gratitude, this book offers practical tools to help you prioritize what truly matters and create a roadmap to lasting happiness. Discover the transformative power of putting pen to paper as you chart your course toward a more illuminating, brighter tomorrow.

With Master Your Life, you’ll learn to:
   Focus your efforts on what truly matters
   Prioritize self-care and fulfillment
   Harness the science of writing to manifest your dreams

Don’t settle for mediocrity. Embrace the extraordinary with Master Your Life and unlock the limitless potential within you.

Description:
Fundada por Antonio Bosch, DELTAPAPER somos una empresa que da servicio a distintos sectores desde hace más de dos décadas.

MISIÓN
Dar asesoramiento y ofrecer la mejor opción de productos de papel consumible de calidad, utilizados en los procesos productivos final de línea y de logística, con unos tiempos óptimos de entrega y a precios competitivos.

VISIÓN
Ser un referente en la comercialización de productos de papel para embalaje en España y Portugal, por la calidad, trato y eficiencia en el servicio.

NUESTROS VALORES
La prioridad de nuestra empresa es la satisfacción del cliente, proporcionando un servicio transparente, eficiente y asequible. Nos esforzamos por mantener la confianza depositada en nosotros, reconociendo la singularidad de cada cliente.

VALOR AÑADIDO
Contamos con ventajas que nos hacen únicos:
Empresa familiar con más de dos décadas de experiencia en el sector.
En continua búsqueda de los mejores productos del mercado a los precios más competitivos.
Distintas alternativas para la rápida adaptación a cada cliente, evitando problemas en su cadena de producción.
Trato directo y familiar, plena transparencia, confianza y personalización.
Disponibilidad de un centro logístico para el almacenaje de stock con la posibilidad de servir nuestros productos con plazos de entrega muy urgentes y así evitar roturas de stock de nuestros clientes.

SOSTENIBILIDAD
En Deltapaper somos muy conscientes de la importancia que tiene el cuidado del medio ambiente y es por eso por lo que ponemos nuestro grano de arena en todo aquello que está en nuestras manos. Utilizamos productos totalmente reciclados, con certificados que garanticen nuestra ideología, incluido el FSC asegurando una gestión forestal responsable.

Name: Commerciale Castellana srl
Description:
PER SODDISFARE LE ESIGENZE DELLA GDO DIVENTIAMO INVISIBILI
Siamo lineari, ordinati, logici.
Il nostro commerciale ogni 3 settimane va nel punto vendita, verifica il venduto ed effettua l’ordine elettronico.
La merce arriva al cliente entro 24/48 ore in tutta Italia (72 ore nelle isole).
Il nostro addetto al marchandising si reca presso il cliente, la preleva e la espone sul lay out stabilito in base agli indici di rotazione dei prodotti e alle caratteristiche del consumatore (ad esempio per la cancelleria scolastica gli scaffali sono a misura di mamma e bambino, 1 metro e 80).
Il cliente vende, al magazzino pensiamo noi, eliminando disservizi, scorte inutili, sprechi di spazio e denaro, merce in giacenza.
Facciamo in modo che il cliente non si renda nemmeno conto di averci tra i fornitori, se non al momento del giusto pagamento.

I NOSTRI NUMERI
Nel 2000 Sergio Baesso costituisce l’azienda, che si specializza nella fornitura di materiale per la GDO, forniture da ufficio, articoli da regalo e didattica. Dal 2004 lo affiancano i due figli e soci, Davide e Alessandro.
Buffetti – azienda di riferimento nella distribuzione di prodotti, servizi e soluzioni per l’ufficio – riconosce l’esperienza ventennale di Sergio e affida a Commerciale Castellana il compito di rappresentare questo rinomato marchio della storica imprenditoria italiana.
Questi i numeri dei primi anni di attività:
- Forniturismo + 10%;
- GDO + 6%;
- nel 2009 apertura della nuova sede;
- 12 regioni servite;
- un incremento di fatturato da 150 milioni di lire a 4 milioni di euro.

Settori merceologici:
	Archiviazione
	Arredamento e complementi
	Audio video e telefonia
	Blocchi e quaderni
	Buste e Imballo
	Cancelleria
	Carta

Name: Koninklijke Moorman Karton Weesp B.V.
Description:
Bij Moorman ademen we karton

In 1912 schreef de heer H.J.A. Moorman zijn Boek- en Papierhandel in bij het Amsterdamse handelsregister. Hij vestigde zich in de Jordaan, waar de basis werd gelegd voor het bedrijf. Oorspronkelijk bestond zijn handel uit dagbladen, papier voor thuisgebruik, verpakkingspapier voor kooplieden en karton voor boekbinderijen en kartonnagebedrijven. Kunstenaars vroegen een speciaal karton voor hun lijsten – zo werd passepartoutkarton een toonaangevend product binnen Moorman. In 1970 verhuisde Moorman Karton naar Weesp, waar 11.000 m² aan kantoor- en productieruimte in gebruik is. Daarnaast beschikt Moorman Karton over een magazijn in het Groningse Winschoten. 

Op 24 augustus 2012 heeft Hare Majesteit de Koningin aan Moorman Karton Weesp B.V, het predicaat Koninklijk verleend. De officiële naam van het bedrijf is sinds die datum daarom Koninklijke Moorman Karton Weesp B.V. In het dagelijks leven houden we het kortweg bij ‘Moorman’ of ‘Moorman Karton’.

In ruim een eeuw tijd is Moorman uitgegroeid van een lokale eenmanszaak tot een internationaal opererende onderneming, waarbij bijna de helft van de omzet inmiddels buiten Nederland wordt gerealiseerd. In eigen land vervullen wij al jarenlang een vooraanstaande groothandelsfunctie voor karton, papier en kunststoffen. Ook in de rest van Europa en ver daarbuiten vertrouwen klanten op onze hoogwaardige halffabricaten, zoals foamboard voor boekbinders, exclusief passepartoutkarton, zuurvrij museumkarton en zelfklevende specialiteiten.

Karton is een milieuvriendelijk product dat grotendeels uit gerecycled papier bestaat en volledig recyclebaar is. Sinds 2009 is Moorman Karton FSC- en PEFC-gecertificeerd voor zowel productie als handel. Deze internationaal erkende keurmerken, gesteund door overheden, bedrijven en milieuorganisaties, garanderen dat onze producten afkomstig zijn uit duurzaam beheerde bossen. Zo dragen wij bij aan een verantwoorde en toekomstbestendige papier- en kartonindustrie.

Name: Kaagazz Inc.
Description:
The inception of ‘Kaagazz’, unlike most popular rolling paper brands, has an influence that is deeply rooted in the South-Asian heritage that precedes us. India has a very rich and often overlooked history of its own when it comes to the culture. A history that is a part of our identity. 

‘Kaagazz’ rolling paper is the perfect blend between the rich, ancient Indian past and the boundless future that lies ahead. ‘Kaagazz’ is a premium rolling paper brand, purely made so that you can have an experience unlike any other, with a paper that is vegan, eco-friendly and very easy to use. 

At ‘Kaagazz’ we firmly believe in giving back to the community that we come from and helping make changes at the grassroots level. We donate a considerable amount of our annual proceeds to NGOs that help and support women through their daily struggles, we believe in giving back to our community every chance we get. We want to pay homage to the rich ‘Naari’ culture that we come from, which inspires us to rethink and question the norms, and we want to make sure we take these values into the future with us. 

At ‘Kaagazz’, we try very hard to provide an accessible platform for change. We hope to be a part of the growing renaissance we see in our culture through a growing appreciation of art and artists, and we hope you come along with us for the ride.

Name: Nelson Line
Description:
A unique card.
A thoughtful handwritten note.
A gift wrapped in exquisite paper.

In today’s hyper-connected world, we’re constantly in touch—emailing, texting, tweeting—but something feels missing. That “something” is rediscovered when we receive a card in the mail. The excitement of opening it, reading handwritten words, feeling the quality of the paper, and admiring the design, knowing it was chosen just for us. It finds a place on the mantel, then in a drawer, where it will be rediscovered and cherished again months later.

A handwritten card, a carefully wrapped gift—what makes them special? It’s the personal touch, the feel of the giver’s thoughtfulness.

At Nelson Line, our mission is to find and create memorable, engaging products for you. 

We are proud to be the exclusive licensee for The New Yorker magazine, bringing its iconic covers and witty cartoons to our collection of cards, gifts, and papers. Dedicated to the art of giving, Nelson Line offers products that make every moment a little more special, with a unique touch of New Yorker sophistication and charm.

Name: LINDA MUNDO
Description:
Kreativität leicht gemacht – Mit Aquarellkunst & Papeterie von Linda Mundo.

Glaubst du, du bist nicht kreativ? Oder dass der Anfang mit Pinsel und Farbe zu kompliziert ist?

Wir bei Linda Mundo sind hier, um dir das Gegenteil zu beweisen. Unsere Mission ist: Kreativ sein leicht gemacht!

Unsere große Leidenschaft ist die Aquarellkunst. Aber wir wissen, dass der erste Schritt oft der schwerste ist. Genau dafür haben wir unsere DIY Ausmalkarten-Sets und Kalender entwickelt.

Das Geheimnis liegt in den zarten, vorgedruckten Outlines der Motive. Der Anfang ist bereits für dich gemacht! Du musst nicht zeichnen können – du kannst direkt zu den Farben greifen und einfach drauf losmalen. So wird Kreativität zum puren, entspannten Vergnügen, ganz ohne Druck.

Was du bei Linda Mundo findest:

 Kreativität leicht gemacht (DIY-Sets): Unsere Ausmalkarten-Sets und Kalender. Dank der vorgedruckten Outlines ist dein Einstieg in die Aquarellkunst garantiert einfach und macht sofort Spaß.

 Inspirierende Papeterie: Entdecke liebevoll gestaltete Postkarten und Klappkarten mit fertigen Aquarell-Motiven. Kleine Kunstwerke, die Freude in den Alltag bringen.

 Workshops: Und wenn du Lust auf mehr hast: Als Zusatzangebot biete ich auch immer mal wieder Workshops an, in denen du tiefere Techniken lernen kannst.

Bei uns geht es nicht um Perfektion, sondern um den Prozess. Das Eintauchen in die Farben ist für uns eine der schönsten Formen der Selfcare – eine bewusste Pause, die den Kopf freimacht.

Bist du bereit, deine kreative Seite (wieder) zu entdecken?

 Besuche jetzt den Shop und finde deine Lieblingsmotive

Name: INTERCART Srl
Description:
Da due generazioni INTERCART rappresenta un partner credibile e costante per i protagonisti che lavorano con successo.

I nostri collaboratori si aggiornano periodicamente su tutte le novità tecniche e commerciali delle loro rappresentate. 

INTERCART cura con particolare interesse e pignoleria e con personale quotidiano impegno dei propri collaboratori le esigenze di ogni singolo cliente e questo senz’altro ha contraddistinto nel corso dei decenni il suo operato sul mercato italiano.

Ufficialmente INTERCART è stata fondata nel 1969, ma le sue origini risalgono agli anni venti, quando il Dr. Franco Maria Capelli era Direttore generale della Cartiera Fabriano Miliani. Più tardi, negli anni cinquanta lui divenne uno dei più attivi protagonisti nel settore della distribuzione.Tale attività venne sviluppata e ampliata da suo figlio Vincenzo Maria Capelli, il quale con la fondazione della INTERCART iniziò a rappresentare diverse Cartiere Europee molto prestigiose sul mercato Italiano.Negli anni 80 la direzione dell’azienda passò alla terza generazione. Antonio Maria Capelli, salvaguardando per la società tutti i severi principi di tradizione e precisione commerciale, inizia a modernizzare l’azienda e a dotarla di un sistema informatico proiettato nel futuro. Nello stesso tempo INTERCART si rende conto della grande importanza del fattore qualitativo sul mercato italiano e comincia a privilegiare rapporti contrattuali con Cartiere tedesche, austriache, francesi, slovene e di altre provenienze europee, senza però mai trascurare anche le cooperazioni con produttori italiani.Si può dire oggi, che il paper business in Italia si copre con la storia della famiglia Capelli. Intercart presenta quel certo “know how” nel settore e quel certo “savoir faire” nel contatto con la clientela che sono delle caratteristiche molto apprezzate sia dai produttori di carta , sia dal mercato italiano e la sua clientela.

Name: Rolly Receipts LLC
Description:
Rolly Receipts is revolutionizing receipts. Our EcoThermal Receipt Paper is the single most eco-friendly receipt on the market, to date. We find that our impact will be valuable to the world as receipts are the one of the most common business necessities but also a leading cause of pollution. We also provide a Smokeable Receipt Paper to Dispensaries across the US.

With EcoThermal receipts, we have found a way to change the receipt game. First off, almost all receipt rolls have a plastic core. Our coreless receipts eliminate the plastic waste at the end of each receipt roll. This will save the Earth from billions of pieces of plastic. Along with this great change, it has been discovered, and proven that there are cancer causing chemicals in current thermal receipts. These chemicals are BPA and BPS. Within 30 seconds of touching thermal receipts, BPA and BPS enter into your bloodstream. Most suppliers provide BPA free receipts but BPA free receipts are using the equally as harmful chemical BPS, so cancer causing chemicals still exist in their thermal receipts. Meanwhile, EcoThermal Receipts are BPA & BPS Free.

Also, for each 1 Case Used we plant 1 Tree with our partners OneTreePlanted Foundation. This eliminates our eco-footprint and cuts into our customers eco-footprint as well.  

From a business stand point, we can provide a great product for a more than competitive price as money is not our main concern, but saving the Earth is.

Name: Bredas
Description:
BREDAS UG – Ihr Partner für nachhaltige Verpackungslösungen

Die BREDAS UG ist Ihr zuverlässiger Spezialist für Verpackungsmaterialien in ganz Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz. Mit einem breiten Sortiment an hochwertigen Papieren, Kartonagen und maßgeschneiderten Lösungen beliefern wir Unternehmen aus Handel, Handwerk, Industrie und E-Commerce. Unser Ziel ist es, Qualität, Nachhaltigkeit und Wirtschaftlichkeit in Einklang zu bringen – für Verpackungen, die nicht nur schützen, sondern auch Werte transportieren.

Unser Sortiment umfasst Seidenpapiere, Einschlagpapiere, Lebensmittelpapiere, Graukarton, Vollpappe, Füllmaterial und Stanzteile, die individuell auf Ihre Anforderungen abgestimmt werden können. Besonders beliebt sind unsere personalisierten Produkte – bereits ab Kleinstmengen mit Ihrem Logo oder Design bedruckbar. So schaffen Sie Wiedererkennungswert, steigern Ihre Markenpräsenz und sorgen gleichzeitig für eine professionelle Außendarstellung.

BREDAS UG steht für verlässliche Lieferungen, transparente Preise und kompetente Beratung. Dank unseres europaweiten Netzwerks bieten wir nicht nur günstige Konditionen, sondern auch kurze Lieferzeiten und flexible Bestellmengen – vom Einzelbogen bis zur Palettenware. Damit unterstützen wir kleine Betriebe ebenso wie Großkunden, die auf nachhaltige Verpackungslösungen setzen.

Ein besonderes Augenmerk legen wir auf Umweltschutz und Ressourcenschonung. Viele unserer Produkte bestehen aus recyceltem Material oder sind mehrfach verwendbar. Mit unserer Philosophie „Verpacken mit Haltung“ tragen wir aktiv dazu bei, den CO₂-Fußabdruck unserer Kunden zu reduzieren – ohne Kompromisse bei Qualität und Funktionalität.

Ob Bäcker, Metzger, Online-Shop, Mode-Label oder Industriebetrieb – wir liefern die passende Lösung für jede Branche. Lassen auch Sie sich von unserem Service überzeugen und entdecken Sie Verpackung neu gedacht.

 Mehr erfahren: www.bredas.eu

Name: PaperPods (Paper Recycling Lab)
Description:
Introducing the Seeds of Change
Introducing Paper Pods - a visionary blend of sustainability and innovation, encapsulating the spirit of growth and nurturing within each pod. Much like a seed pod, our journey is rooted in fostering positive change, starting with every sheet of paper.

At Paper Pods, we believe in the potential of every seed, every idea, and every community. The concept of 'pod' not only signifies the seeds embedded in our paper, ready to sprout life, but also reflects a place where communities gather to grow ideas and nurture change.

Just like pods shelter seeds and foster growth, they also represent our growing community - a place where like-minded individuals and businesses come together to nurture eco-consciousness. Our commitment goes beyond paper. Soon, you'll see Paper Pods in the form of innovative packaging solutions, and even micro recycling pods where you can drop your paper waste and experience end-to-end paper circularity. 

Join us in embracing this journey. Choose Paper Pods for a future where every pod is a seed of transformation, and every choice you make contributes to a flourishing, sustainable world. 

Together, let's nurture a future where every pod holds the promise of a greener tomorrow.

Seja nosso parceiro. Com ideias inovadoras, ações práticas e a qualidade da Tubomais, vamos juntos buscar a melhor rentabilidade para seu negócio.

MISSÃO
Oferecer o melhor custo-benefício em tubos de papel para que os clientes tenham segurança, qualidade e eficiência em seus processos industriais.

VISÃO
Ser reconhecida como uma empresa de excelência em qualidade, competitividade e variedade na fabricação de tubos de papel no mercado nacional.

VALORES
Transparência, inovação e qualidade.

Description:
TISOO Bamboo Tissue, by PT Bumi Milik Bersama, provides top-quality tissue paper from the world's fastest-growing plant, bamboo. We are on a journey to become Indonesia's leading supplier of bamboo tissue, promoting a nationwide appreciation for this sustainable alternative.

From sourcing premium materials to exceeding quality expectations, our journey is motivated by refinement and guided by integrity, innovation, and unwavering ethical practices.

Our founders are passionate about eco-friendly cleaning solutions and believe we should choose tissue paper that is made from a more renewable resource than trees.

TISOO prioritizes sustainability without compromising comfort and quality. Our bamboo tissue products are not just as good as conventional ones; they're better. Our premium bamboo toilet paper, facial tissue, and kitchen paper are known for their strength, thickness, and durability, allowing you to use fewer sheets and save more. We're proud to have won over customers who refuse to compromise on quality and want to make a positive change.

We understand the challenge of changing a daily habit, but we offer an upgrade that doesn't ask consumers to compromise. We provide a better option that delivers the same, if not better, experience and is more eco-conscious.

Bamboo pulp provides excellent water absorbency and strength without sacrificing softness. Bamboo is a highly regenerative resource that matures quickly, is resilient, and grows without extensive irrigation. Moreover, it mitigates climate change and promotes sustainable land use.

TISOO prioritizes people and the planet over profit. We are dedicated to responsible sourcing of eco-friendly products. Our bamboo tissue is FSC certified, guaranteeing high-quality sourcing from responsibly managed bamboo plantations. Our reforestation projects also offset carbon emissions and give back to nature.

Name: Carter Paper & Packaging, Inc.
Description:
Carter Paper & Packaging Inc. is a WBENC-certified, women-owned small business based in Peoria, Illinois. We offer a wide range of products, including paper, packaging, office supplies, sanitation items, custom boxes, and more. Our mission is to deliver high-quality products with integrity, creativity, and authenticity while building lasting partnerships that support our customers’ success.
We serve both businesses and individuals through our local Peoria office and a fully equipped e-commerce website, enabling us to grow both locally and online.
Carter Paper is committed to meeting customer needs quickly, efficiently, and affordably. Through partnerships with diverse manufacturers, we provide access to thousands of off-the-shelf products. When standard solutions don’t fit, we work closely with customers to create custom products using our extensive supplier network.
Our small, agile team is key to our success. Every member plays a vital role, from warehouse staff and drivers to sales and office personnel. Our delivery driver is especially known for going the extra mile to assist customers.
We’re also focused on innovation and sustainability, offering products like reduced waste, compostable, and biodegradable packaging. In addition to core items like boxes, wraps, and paper, we offer unique services that set us apart:
•	Free local delivery with minimum order
•	Same-day pickup for in-stock items
•	Custom-cut foam and bubble rolls
•	Product recommendations tailored to your needs
We understand the challenges small businesses face and strive to balance quality with cost-effectiveness. Our flexible, responsive service is designed to support a wide range of customer needs.
At Carter Paper & Packaging, we’re more than a supplier, we’re your partner in success.

Name: Lemon Milk Paper Co
Description:
Hi friends! Welcome to my creative outlet. My name is Emmy Severs, and I am the owner and founder of Lemon Milk Paper Co. It’s funny how life comes full circle. I spent my childhood illustrating greeting cards for family and friends’ birthdays, like most children do, except I added a signature logo on the back of each card: The Emmy Company with a balloon. The pandemic gave people the opportunity to revaluate their passions and find something they connected with. For me, that was connecting back to my old love of illustrating greeting cards, this time with my iPad instead of crayons and colored pencils. Before I knew it, Lemon Milk Paper Co was born in April of 2020. 

I wear my heart on my sleeve and always let the people in my life know how much they mean to me, so what better way to do that than through greeting cards? I have always kept greeting cards throughout my life in a box in my closet to look at when I need a pick me up or be reminded of a memory. All Lemon Milk Paper Co greeting cards are blank inside because we believe in keeping you and your loved ones connected through heartfelt, handwritten notes. When you gift Lemon Milk Paper Co, you are gifting a memory.

I currently run Lemon Milk Paper Co and attend college at West Virginia University full time while pursuing a degree in Entrepreneurship and Innovation. If you have any questions, concerns, or would like to get in touch please contact at info@lemonmilkpaperco.com. Thanks for reading my story!

But our story goes beyond the cards themselves. It's rooted in the belief that in this fast-paced and increasingly impersonal world, the intentionality of giving and receiving a heartfelt, tangible card holds immeasurable value. From birthdays to weddings, baby showers to sorrowful condolences, we've curated a collection of greeting cards that are designed to capture the essence of life’s treasured moments. 

We believe that every card tells a story – a story of love, friendship, resilience, or hope - and we’re honored to be the conveyer of how that story is shared.

Description:
Welcome to Cemara Paper! We are dedicated innovators in sustainable paper products, driven by a dual mission: to foster environmental preservation and community empowerment.

Based in Bandung, Indonesia, we meticulously transform paper waste into unique, high-quality, and entirely eco-friendly handmade products. Our diverse collection features:

Versatile Recycled Paper: Available in various sizes and textures, perfect for printing, drawing, and crafting.
Artisanal Handmade Books & Notes: Including aesthetic variants adorned with real dried flowers.
Eco-Conscious Business Cards & Packaging: Exclusive business cards, elegant tissue boxes, and charming gift boxes crafted from recycled materials.
Eco-Friendly Printing Services & Sustainable Merchandise: Creative solutions tailored for both business and personal needs.
Engaging Recycled Paper Making Workshops: Interactive educational experiences designed for all ages and backgrounds.
More than just a business, Cemara Paper is a movement. We proudly empower individuals with disabilities, integrating them as essential members of our production and creative team, thereby creating valuable opportunities and added worth. Each product we craft is a testament to waste-based innovation, sustainability education, and impactful community collaboration.

We proudly serve a diverse range of market segments, from students, creative and environmental communities, and corporate CSR programs, to SMEs and individuals committed to a sustainable lifestyle.

Join us in creating a positive impact for our planet and communities. Explore our unique products, participate in our engaging workshops, and let's collaborate towards a greener, more inclusive, and meaningful future!

Name: The Hansel Trading Co.
Description:
Established in 1936, The Hansel Trading Co. was founded with the objective of distributing high-quality paper and board products. We primarily serve the central region of India, with a strong focus on Madhya Pradesh. 

Our operations are based in Indore — the industrial and commercial hub of the state — where we’ve built a large and loyal customer base over the decades. Driven by our commitment to delivering value, we aim to exceed customer expectations and nurture long-term partnerships with our suppliers. 

At Hansel Trading, quality, reliability, and relationship-building are at the heart of everything we do. The Hansel Trading Co. is a distinguished name in the paper trading industry. 

Headquartered in the Polo Ground Industrial Area, Indore, we operate from a sprawling 25,000 sq. ft. facility, which includes:

● A state-of-the-art rack-based warehouse spanning 6,000 sq. ft., with a total storage capacity of 500 MT
● A separate, well-organized reel inventory warehouse with a 200 MT capacity

Name: SHANGHAI FENGYI MULTIPLEX MATERIALS CO., LTD
Description:
Shanghai Fengyi Paperboard and Converting Co., Ltd. was established in 2000 with a registered capital of CNY 50 million. The company is located at No. 89 Jinle Road, Baoshan District, Shanghai. As a merchant and manufacturer of premium packaging materials, Fengyi offers integrated packaging solutions including sourcing, development and production to meet the various needs of global customers. Building on its know-how and modern facility, Fengyi has gained a competitive edge and reputation in the development of products and technologies in China’s packaging industry.

At Fengyi, we offer a wide selection of packaging products and tailored solutions in segments, such as high-end cigarettes, alcoholic beverages, electronics, detergents, cosmetics, food, and pharmaceuticals. As a merchant, Fengyi also works in close collaboration with leading paperboard mills worldwide, promoting quality products with ready stocks for supply and immediate delivery. 

Based in the Yangtze River Delta region of China and headquartered in Shanghai, Fengyi has built up a sales and marketing network nationwide in China. We have an office building and a production base in Shanghai, as well as a 40,000 sq.mt. main production base in Haimen of Nantong. Fengyi has approximately 200 employees and is well equipped with facilities, offering service for converting, laminating, hot-foil stamping, sheeting, and etc. The company has an annual production capacity of 40,000 tons, owning 8 lamination lines and hundreds of testing instruments. With a warehousing capacity of 300,000 tons, Fengyi is also capable of offering prompt distribution of various paperboard products besides its services of converting and finishing. Fengyi has maintained a steady growth in sales in recent year: its total sales in 2021 was CNY 370 million.

Name: This Might Work
Description:
This Might Work is a quiet rebellion against perfection and a gentle permission to experiment, revise, and grow through honest attempts.
At This Might Work, we design supportive paper goods for the messy reality of work. We are here to give structured space to your brave attempts. All our products are highly functional, no nonsense, featuring clever design interventions for a very pared down look, so you can get creative (or not).
You’ll recognize us by soft covers in refined muted tones, well-structured layouts, non-serif typography, unusual pop of words, and glimpses of handcrafted details (we love an exposed binding).
We know this is something you also care about, so we use sustainable premium paper, and make sure that everything, from design to eco-friendly printing and binding, is done in Slovenia.
This Might Work was founded by Nika Ferš, a graphic designer passionate about paper and printing techniques. For over a decade, Nika has been creating sleek visual identities for niche and large companies in her studio.

Die Zufriedenstellung unserer Kunden ist oberstes Ziel bei BARON PAPIER. Aus diesem Grund arbeiten wir ständig an technischen Innovationen und kontinuierlichen Verbesserungen unserer Prozesse.

Mit unserer schlanken Struktur und modernster Produktionstechnik verarbeiten wir Papier für die unterschiedlichsten Gewerbe- und Industriezweige. Selbst kleine Auftragsgrößen werden bei uns schnell zu fairen Preisen abgewickelt.

Name: Hempur Eco-Innovative Bamboo Paper Solutions
Description:
Hempur Eco-Innovative Bamboo Paper Solutions for business 

At Hempur, our ethos, "Nature is not a trend," is more than just a slogan; it's a commitment to eco-conscious innovation and sustainable living. Pioneering the transformation in paper consumption, we leverage the remarkable qualities of bamboo to create a range of eco-friendly products, from toilet paper to professional-grade kitchen towels, facial tissues, jumbo rollers, and bespoke B2B solutions.

Our dedication to environmental stewardship is evident in our carbon-neutral manufacturing processes. Utilizing renewable energy from our on-site solar plant, complemented by a biomass facility, we set a benchmark for sustainable production. Our holistic approach extends to water conservation, where our state-of-the-art treatment facilities ensure a return to nature in pristine condition, aligning with our vision of harmony with the environment.

Hempur's product range, certified by EU ECO LABEL, FSC, and ISEGA among others, reflects our unwavering commitment to quality and sustainability. Our innovative bamboo dispensers, designed with aesthetics and functionality in mind, complement our paper products, offering a seamless eco-friendly solution.

Our impact resonates beyond product innovation. By choosing Hempur, you're advocating for a reduction in carbon and plastic waste, championing renewable energy, and contributing to the preservation of our planet's natural resources. Join us in our journey towards a sustainable future, where every choice makes a difference.

Discover more about our vision and products at www.gethempur.com. Together, we can redefine sustainability, one sheet at a time.

Name: Heyyy Ltd
Description:
To most, Heyyy Cards is just another new company trying to makes waves in an industry as old as time itself, but to us Heyyy means so much more, here is our story...

Heyyy Cards was established in 2021 by two hopeless romantics, husband and wife team Dan and Yvette Clarkson. Ever since we first met we've written and sent cards to one another, leaving notes of love around the home every so often to bring a smile or write down memories of our journey together. Each card always starting with the same word "Heyyy".

So after buying, collecting and sending hundreds of cards to each other over the years a small dream started to grow.
 
We wondered if we could create our own greeting cards to make people laugh, smile or maybe shed a tear just as they had done for us. After many long evenings spent discussing ideas, putting pen to paper and crafting our designs, eventually a collection of premium quality products was ready to launch to the world. The one bit that was relatively easy was the name... Heyyy, origin story and all.

Every step of our journey has been filled with love, from finding ethically sourced products, adapting the right sentiments to create beautiful quality cards backed by excellent customer service.
 
In creating Heyyy our ethos is to make cards that allow people to connect with one another through simple images that bring a smile and sentiments that instantly remind you of a loved one. We truly hope you love them as much as we do.  
 
Every great day starts with a Heyyy.

Description: Jewellery or jewelry is a form of personal adornment such as brooches rings necklaces earrings and bracelets.With some exceptions such as medical alert bracelets or military dog tags jewellery normally differs from other items of personal adornment in that it has no other purpose than to look appealing but humans have been producing and wearing it for a long time &ndash with 100000-year-old beads made from Nassarius shells thought to be the oldest known jewellery.Jewellery may be made from a wide range of materials but gemstones precious metals beads and shells have been widely used. Depending on the culture and times jewellery may be appreciated as a status symbol for its material properties its patterns or for meaningful symbols. Jewellery has been made to adorn nearly every body part from hairpins to toe rings.The word jewellery itself is derived from the word jewel which was anglicized from the Old French jouel[3] and beyond that to the Latin word jocale meaning plaything. In British English the spelling can be written as jewelery or jewellery while in U.S. English the spelling is jewelry

Name: ECOFOL, s.r.o.
Description:
ECOFOL je českou jedničkou na trhu s jednorázovým nádobím a obalovým materiálem určeným pro balení potravin a hotových jídel.

Náš tým, který pečuje o spokojenost našich zákazníků, čítá přibližně 30 odborně vyškolených zaměstnanců. Spolupracujeme s mnoha výrobci obalových materiálů a jednorázového nádobí z České republiky, ale také z řady zemí celého světa. 
 
Od roku 2006 nabízíme zákazníkům jako výhradní dovozce vlastní produktovou řadu obalových materiálů a jednorázového nádobí ideal pack, které pro nás na míru vyrábějí významní světoví výrobci tohoto zboží. Samozřejmé je, že k distribuovaným výrobkům vlastníme veškeré atesty a že naše produkty splňují potřebné hygienické normy.

ECOFOL & ekologie
Náš postoj k otázce ekologie a obalových materiálů je konstantní a jasný. Na jednu stranu se nepovažujeme za odborníky v oboru ekologie a na druhou stranu jsme přesvědčeni, že naši zákazníci mají právo si sami určit obalový materiál a jednorázové nádobí, které chtějí pro balení a prodej svého zboží používat. Zároveň garantujeme, že veškeré naše zboží je v souladu s platnou legislativou Čr.

ECOFOL svým zákazníkům nabízí široké spektrum obalových materiálů a jednorázového nádobí z nejrůznějších materiálů.. Recyklované a recyklovatelné obalové materiály, rozložitelné i kompostovatelné, všechny tyto moderní balicí i jednorázové nádobí.

L’activité destinée aux entreprises et aux professions libérales se développa essentiellement au début des années 80.

C’est en 1989 que l’orientation vers l’informatique fut prise. Lorsque la 2ième génération eu droit à une retraite bien méritée en décembre 2001, nous avons décidé de nous séparer de l’imprimerie afin de nous concentrer sur ce qui était devenu notre activité principale :
Informatique, consommables et papeterie de bureau.

En août 2020, la nouvelle génération continue être à votre service au niveau vos achats de papeterie et bureautique; et veillera à ce que le secteur graphique ait une nouvelle entrée.

Ιδρυτής της εταιρίας και αυτός που ξεκίνησε να αναπτύσσει τις αντιπροσωπείες κιβωτίων και άλλων ειδών συσκευασίας είναι ο κος Γκαγκασούλης Γεώργιος δίνοντας αρχικά σε κάθε συνεργαζόμενη επιχείρηση αυτό που ζητά πραγματικά.

Η εμπειρία του στο χώρο των πωλήσεων του επέτρεψε να έχει άριστη γνώση των μεταβαλλόμενων συνθηκών της αγοράς, αλλά και των αναγκών των μεμονωμένων πλέον πελατών ανάλογα με το αντικείμενό τους.

Ο Αθανάσιος Γκαγκασούλης ως υιός και διάδοχος συνεχίζει την παράδοση εξελίσσοντας τη, με βάσεις τις σπουδές του στα Οικονομικά και την μετεκπαίδευσή του στη Διοίκηση Επιχειρήσεων, με στόχο να παρέχει στους πελάτες αυτό που ζητούν.
Aνταποκρινόμαστε άμεσα και πάντοτε στις ανάγκες του πελάτη, συμβαδίζουμε με τις ανάγκες της εποχής και μεταφερόμαστε και σε ηλεκτρονική πλατφόρμα δημιουργώντας ένα «χώρο» με εύκολη πρόσβαση, χρήση και ακόμα πιο άμεση ανταπόκριση.

Το eshop μας αναφέρεται σε πολλούς κωδικούς κιβωτίων με δυνατότητα άμεσης αποστολής σε όλες τις περιοχές της Ελλάδος, αλλά και σε εξατομικευμένες παραγγελίες που καλύπτουν απόλυτα τις ανάγκες του κάθε πελάτη και αφορά σε χαρτοκιβώτια 3φυλλα και 5φυλλα, λευκά και καφέ, τυπωμένα και ατύπωτα, καθώς και σε ευρύτερη διάθεση υλικών συσκευασίας.

British Book — самая большая база иностранной литературы в Украине!

Мы не продаем книги — мы помогаем вам развиваться.

— Какая компания предоставит Вам редкую книгу иностранного автора в оригинале в течение короткого времени?

— А какая компания расскажет Вам обо всех мероприятиях, связанных с испанской, французской или немецкой филологией, причем совершенно бесплатно?

Мы задавали себе эти вопросы неоднократно, вот почему появился «British Book».
«British Book» — единственный ресурс с самой большой базой иностранной литературы в Украине!

Кому подойдет «British Book»?
— ученикам школ, студентам и тем, кто посещает курсы иностранных языков;
— желающим чувствовать себя комфортно за границей;
— специалистам узкого профиля, инженерам, финансистам, психологам, юристам, любителям читать художественную литературу в оригинале.
А также:
— учителям, преподавателям и репетиторам;
— книжным компаниям и магазинам;
— организаторам курсов иностранных языков.

Description:
Decitre Pro, votre partenaire livres & savoirs

Depuis plus d’un siècle, Decitre s’engage à rendre le livre accessible à tous. Avec Decitre Pro, nous mettons cette expertise au service des professionnels : entreprises, collectivités, établissements scolaires, associations, administrations et institutions culturelles.

Notre mission est simple : vous accompagner dans tous vos projets autour du livre et de la lecture, en vous proposant des solutions adaptées à vos besoins spécifiques.

 Nos atouts :

Un catalogue riche et diversifié : plusieurs millions de références disponibles, couvrant tous les domaines du savoir, de la littérature à la documentation professionnelle.

Une base de données parmi les plus importantes du marché, pour garantir un accès rapide et exhaustif aux titres recherchés.

Des avancées technologiques pour simplifier et fluidifier vos passages de commande, avec des outils pensés pour les professionnels.

Des services sur mesure : constitution de bibliothèques, dotations scolaires, cadeaux d’entreprise, dispositifs d’animation culturelle, événements littéraires.

Une logistique fiable et performante : gestion centralisée, facturation simplifiée, livraison partout en France et à l’international.

Un accompagnement humain : une équipe dédiée de conseillers professionnels pour vous guider et répondre à vos demandes spécifiques.

 Notre engagement :

Parce que le livre est un vecteur de transmission et de lien, nous croyons à son rôle essentiel dans l’éducation, la culture et le développement des organisations. En choisissant Decitre Pro, vous bénéficiez à la fois de la solidité d’un acteur historique et de la proximité d’un partenaire à l’écoute de vos enjeux.

 Que vous soyez une entreprise cherchant à valoriser vos collaborateurs, une collectivité souhaitant enrichir son offre culturelle ou une école désireuse de donner le goût de lire aux plus jeunes, Decitre Pro est là pour construire avec vous des solutions pérennes et adaptées.

Name: CaliWare, Inc.
Description:
At CaliWare, we specialize in food packing solutions. We are dedicated to offering high-quality and sustainable packaging options to meet the diverse needs of our clients.

Our primary focus is on providing environmentally friendly alternatives, and one of our core product lines includes sugarcane bagasse products. Bagasse, a byproduct of sugarcane processing, serves as an excellent alternative to traditional disposable food packaging. We offer a wide range of sugarcane bagasse products, such as plates, bowls, and boxes, which are not only biodegradable but also compostable, making them an eco-conscious choice for businesses and individuals alike.

Additionally, we understand the significance of paper-based packaging solutions. Our selection of paper cups, bowls, and boxes offers versatility and durability while maintaining an eco-friendly approach. These products are made from responsibly sourced paper materials and are recyclable, ensuring minimal impact on the environment.

While our focus lies on sustainable options, we also acknowledge the need for plastic cups in certain industries. However, we prioritize responsible plastic use by providing cups made from high-quality materials that are both safe for use and recyclable. Our plastic cups adhere to strict quality standards to guarantee customer satisfaction.

At CaliWare, we take pride in our commitment to quality, sustainability, and customer service. Our knowledgeable team is dedicated to assisting you in finding the perfect food packing solutions for your business needs. Whether you require sugarcane bagasse products, paper cups, bowls, or plastic cups, we are here to provide you with reliable and eco-conscious options.

Name: Askews
Description:
Our present day status as a world-class library supplier is rooted in the history of its two founding companies - James Askew & Son Ltd and The Holt Jackson Book Co Ltd.

Askews, founded in 1872 and The Holt Jackson Book Co Ltd in 1932 have independently witnessed fascinating social change, including the rise in literacy, the development of the print and publishing industry and the establishment of public libraries, to cater for the population's ever-growing appetite for reading and embracement of new technology.

On 1st March 2011, the two companies, already part of The Little Group, which also has the UK's leading Book and AV wholesaler Gardners within it's stable, merged to form the U.K.'s premier library supplier.

Operating from Lancashire premises, in Preston City Centre, Askews are an innovative, dynamic and focused supplier, whose sole objective is to provide a range of services that will ensure customers continue to meet and exceed their library users' expectations.

The company provides a wide range of solutions to Public and School Libraries and other businesses both in the U.K. and overseas, including shelf ready processing, supplier selection services, bibliographic content, multi-media material, eBooks, promotional support and market leading web technology.

Providing the highest standard of customer satisfaction is the number one priority for Askews and we believe our continued success originates from a dedication to developing, with stakeholders, a range of innovative and cost effective solutions, without compromising our commitment to quality.

 Lemoncraft is a brand invented and dreamed by cardmaker - for other cardmakers - from all over the world.
Why a lemon? Because it is yellow, energetic and filled with sunny joy. And this joy is a unique and beautiful joy - the joy of creating :-) And this is what the Lemoncraft brand is like - joyful and creative. We gather around us people who want to enjoy life, love to create and be smiling. And that's all.
Our fantastic adventure is now in its ninth year and we still can't get enough. We still want to give you more. More fun to create! More satisfaction with what you can create with our papers!
 Today, Lemoncraft is a constantly growing brand, a producer and distributor of professional scrapbooking papers. Our papers are known in many parts of the world and are distinguished by their original design and fidelity to romantic style. 
But it is not everything. 
What makes us stand out in the scrabooking industry is design with passion and commitment. Each Lemoncraft collection consists patterns and colors flowing straight from the heart. 
We spend long hours above each, refining the details and enclosing in paper all the emotions that accompany us in the creative process. 
And finally what is most important - each collection is complemented by Lemoncraft brand lovers, reaching for our papers to create amazing creations. Therefore, I cordially invite you to this wonderful, joyful adventure, which is creative work!

Name: PlanetPulp
Description:
The global paper industry heavily relies on environmentally harmful practices, including chlorine-based bleaching agents and excessive waste of water and raw materials. Additionally, traditional recycled paper often sacrifices quality, resulting in brownish, less smooth products unsuitable for many applications. Plastic-coated paper, commonly used for packaging and printing, further exacerbates environmental concerns due to its difficulty in recycling and disposal.
PlanetPulp addresses these challenges by providing a sustainable alternative: eco-friendly, high-quality paper with a white finish, produced through Hydrogen Peroxide bleaching. Our solution minimizes environmental harm, maximizes resource efficiency, and turns waste into compost, contributing to a circular economy.

Name: Simply paper
Description:
Advance your sustainability commitments with Simply Paper — practical impact, measurable results.

At Simply Paper, we offer a smarter, cleaner alternative to conventional copy paper — made from 95% agricultural waste and just 5% responsibly sourced plantation pulp. Our supply chain is designed for environmental efficiency, with fibres sourced within 50 km of the mill and a carbon footprint 38% lower than traditional paper.

Our paper is carbon neutral, Elemental Chlorine-Free (ECF) bleached, and frees up Australian timber for higher-value uses, reducing the pressure on forests and enabling a truly circular economy.

But our impact goes beyond the environment.

By sourcing agricultural waste that would otherwise be burned, we help reduce air pollution and support healthier communities. We provide farmers with added income and work with a Certified B Corp mill that prioritises fair, sustainable practices.

We’re here for businesses, schools, and organisations ready to take action — and turn their everyday choices into long-term change.

Name: Jamarko
Description:
Established in 2001, Jamarko is a socially driven enterprise based in Nepal, dedicated to environmental sustainability and inclusive economic empowerment. What began as a small cottage industry has evolved into a purpose-led organization at the intersection of recycling, craftsmanship, and community development.

We specialize in producing recycled paper and eco-friendly paper products, crafted from waste paper collected through local networks. Our process not only diverts paper waste from landfills but also transforms it into high-quality, handmade products for conscious consumers and businesses. In addition to recycled materials, we proudly incorporate Lokta paper—a traditional Nepali paper made from the native Lokta plant—celebrated for its resilience, sustainability, and cultural heritage.

Jamarko’s mission extends beyond product creation. We are committed to minimizing environmental impact, conserving natural resources, and raising awareness around responsible consumption. By promoting alternatives to mass-produced paper goods, we aim to foster a circular economy that benefits both people and the planet.

At our core, we believe that recycled paper is more than a sustainable option—it’s a meaningful step toward a more regenerative future.

In recent years, our trade practices have been recently booming, and this growth saw “industrial

production unit of Salsal paper” as one of the largest listed papermaking company in Iran.

In 2002, with regard to a dire need of the domestic market, while paper was in high demand in our country, the production line of Test Linear Paper and Fluting Paper, 240 cm in width, with annual production of 20,000 tons was imported from Japan, and within 2 years, in 2004, the operation of the production line through drawing on the domestic and foreign expertise came in commission.

We are proud of the progress we have made, and the growth we have achieved in our chosen market. We have constantly made every endeavor to develop our capabilities and potentialities to become a strategic supplier for our customers.

Name: Moleskine Brasil
Description:
O caderno Moleskine é o herdeiro e sucessor do lendário caderno usado por artistas e pensadores nos últimos dois séculos.

Hoje, Moleskine engloba uma família de objetos nômades dedicados às nossas identidades móveis, ferramentas versáteis para viagens cotidianas e extraordinárias: cadernos, diários, bolsas, aplicativos, instrumentos de escrita e acessórios de leitura que se complementam em forma e função, tornando-se parte integrante de nossas personalidades.

A empresa começou como Modo&Modo, uma pequena editora milanesa que, em 1997, deu vida ao caderno original e estabeleceu a marca Moleskine. A Moleskine Srl adquiriu os direitos de marca registrada mundial da marca em janeiro de 2007 e foi listada na Bolsa de Valores italiana em 2013. A marca foi adquirida e retirada da lista pela D’Ieteren no final de 2016.

Com sede em Milão e escritórios em Colônia, Nova York, Hong Kong, Xangai e Tóquio, a empresa Moleskine conta com cerca de 400 funcionários e uma vasta rede de parceiros e consultores.

Uma equipe dedicada da Global Custom Edition trabalha para ajudar as principais instituições culturais, empresas e agências do mundo a contar suas histórias através de objetos Moleskine personalizados.

این شرکت با تولید رول حرارتی برای دستگاههای کارتخوان و فروشگاهی، زنجیره تأمین بخش بزرگی از شبکه بانکی و خردهفروشی کشور را پوشش میدهد. تعهد اصلی ما بر سه اصل استوار است: کیفیت ثابت و سازگار با دستگاهها، تحویل بهموقع و تولید منطبق با سفارش مشتری.

با ظرفیت تولید سالانه ۱۰۰۰ تن و پشتیبانی از مشتریان بزرگی مانند بانک سامان و پرداخت الکترونیک سامانکیش، چشمانداز ما تثبیت جایگاهی به عنوان بازیگری اصلی و نوآور در این صنعت است.

Name: Mohawkmomma Studio Boutique
Description:
Mohawkmomma Studio Boutique is not your average stationery + gift-giving company. We're a movement of peace + play vibes. Grace-givers. Shalom-makers. Champions of curiosity. Pen pal enthusiasts. Love letter scribblers. Coloring connoisseurs. Journaling ninjas. And, most importantly, women + girls who give to themselves as much as they give of themselves, guilt-free. We emphasize botanicals + Black women in our images.

Started as a podcast movement to encourage more analog, communal coloring + journaling connections in an age of shorthanded digital convenience, Mohawkmomma Studio Boutique believes, journaling is a pathway to amplify peace and coloring is a playground + sanctuary.
 
Through an aesthetic lens that is both botanical + Black women and girls centered, and whimsically elegant, our designs aspire women into a guided pastoral experience that awakens + assists you to amplify your peace in childlike wonder as you align with your feminine rhythms.

Mohawkmomma Studio Boutique is based in Atlanta where it seeks to nourish feminine rhythms with the neuroaesthetics of
paper, peace, play (and luxe gifts).

We are a family-run, premier soul care destination offering direct to customers and retailers.

Our stationery + gifts provide an unquestionable feeling of peace and calm for the inner child in us all. 

It’s a melanated musing #soulcare space for all.

Wholesale | Direct | Global distribution | Georgia, USA based

Name: EcoMaximus
Description:
Maximus is a company manufacturing handmade paper, Note Books, Annulments’ and products out of elephant dung and other waste matter. We have progressed from our humble beginnings employing just 7 people in 1997 to an employer of nearly 200 by 2009.The entire production process is all eco friendly using only post – consumer raw materials and non – toxic consumables. 

Our facilities are established in rural areas of the country namely, Kegalle, Kandalama, Sigiriya and Habarana empowering the rural youth with strategic intent giving many opportunities for career development and opportunities in the area. The expansion and employment opportunities have been created not in close proximity to urban areas but instead, have been deliberately moved to remote parts of the country where job opportunities are few but wildlife thrives.

A main attribute of our success is a unique Sri Lankan design flavor inherent in the products. Our strategic intent has been to develop in a direction that attempts to marry the interests of job creation, wildlife protection, elephant conservation and female empowerment through the production of beautiful, aesthetically pleasing gift products made by hand from 100% waste material.

Name: Algaemi Inc.
Description:
Transforming Paper, Transforming Our World

Here at Algaemi, we're passionate about crafting a sustainable future, one page at a time. Recognizing the environmental impact of traditional paper production, we've harnessed the power of algae to create a carbon-positive alternative.

What We Offer:

- Sustainable, high-quality paper that's kinder to the planet and your wallet.
- Reliable, indigenous supply through our "Make in India" commitment.
- A circular economy model that minimizes waste and aligns with the UN's Sustainable Development Goals.
- Significant environmental impact: Each kilogram of Algaemi paper sequesters carbon equivalent to planting 312 trees!

Our Mission:

Algaemi aims to be India's leading producer of sustainable algae paper by 2030. We believe in revolutionizing the industry while leaving a lasting positive impact on our world.

Embrace the future of paper. Join the Algaemi story.

#EmbraceTheFutureOfPaper #Algaemi #TheAlchemyOfAlgae

Name: Kiruthika Agencies | Paper Recyclers
Description:
Kiruthika Agencies - Redefining Sustainable Paper Solutions

About Us: 

Kiruthika Agencies stands as a dynamic player in the field of paper recycling, spearheading innovative and sustainable paper waste management solutions. With an unwavering commitment to excellence and over three decades of industry experience, we have become a trusted partner for paper mills across India.

Our Services:

 At Kiruthika Agencies, we offer a comprehensive suite of services designed to optimize paper recycling processes and cater to the unique needs of paper mills. Our services include:

Paper Waste Management: 
Our cutting-edge approach to paper waste management ensures efficient and environmentally responsible disposal, minimizing the ecological footprint.

Collection Services: 
We provide a seamless and reliable collection system that facilitates the efficient gathering of paper waste from various sources, streamlining the recycling process.

Grading Expertise: 
With meticulous attention to detail, we employ advanced grading techniques to sort paper waste according to specific characteristics, ensuring high-quality recycled materials.

Indenting Solutions:
Our specialized indenting services ensure that paper mills receive materials precisely tailored to their fiber and chemical specifications, enhancing production efficiency.

Our Commitment: 

Recycling paper is not merely a response to environmental concerns at Kiruthika Agencies; it is a deeply ingrained commitment to our mission. For more than 30 years, we have remained steadfast in our goal to guarantee that the exact fiber and chemical specifications required by our esteemed paper mill customers are met, irrespective of challenges.

Why Choose Kiruthika Agencies:
Expertise
Innovation
Quality Assurance 
Sustainability Champion.

Name: PIERI GROUP srl
Description:
Siamo un’impresa romagnola, vicina alle realtà del turismo e dell’accoglienza tipica di questi luoghi:
anche per questo, i settori della ristorazione e dell’ospitalità sono da sempre il core business della nostra attività e in essi sono radicati la nostra esperienza e il nostro know how. Con oltre 30 attività di servizio ed oltre 2500 articoli attinenti al mondo dell'igiene e del comfort, siamo i partner ideali per garantire un servizio su misura, veloce ed attento.

La nostra azienda nasce nel 1979 e si fa subito conoscere sul territorio per onestà, trasparenza e serietà, oltre che per l’elevata professionalità offerta dai propri prodotti e servizi. Nel corso degli anni abbiamo allargando l’assortimento di prodotti e dei servizi ed abbiamo investito sull’elevata competenza delle nostre risorse umane.

Oggi la Pieri Group ha le dimensioni e le caratteristiche di un vero gruppo, ampio e diversificato, in grado di rispondere alle esigenze, sempre più nuove, di un mercato in continuo mutamento.

Il pulito non può essere soltanto un semplice obiettivo "di superficie": per la nostra impresa diventa un valore profondo di etica e trasparenza, a cui tendere ogni giorno coinvolgendo l'intera filiera produttiva e di consumo, nel rispetto del contesto sociale e ambientale in cui operiamo.

Name: DBC Paper
Description:
Dal 2003, la nostra azienda è specializzata nella distribuzione e lavorazione di carte e cartoncini, attraverso la ribobinatura o il formato su bancale per conto proprio e di terzi. 

Efficienza, qualità, ricerca, innovazione tecnologica ed ecosostenibilità dei processi: questi i nostri obiettivi.

Monitoriamo continuamente e approfonditamente il processo produttivo e i prodotti in lavorazione: questo ci distingue sia a livello di qualità del prodotto sia per l'attenzione che riserviamo all'ambiente. Siamo certificati FSC, crediamo nella carta riciclata e nell'energia pulita.

I processi di magazzinaggio hanno raggiunto la massima ottimizzazione, i nostri impianti garantiscono una perfetta efficientizzazione. 

Ci definiamo customer-oriented: siamo soddisfatti solo se il nostro cliente è soddisfatto. Questa è una sfida quotidiana, e la vogliamo vincere con quattro ingredienti: qualità, massima rapidità, innovazione produttiva e l'ottimizzazione dei costi, sempre nel continuo rispetto dell'ambiente.

Name: Illoa
Description:
Bienvenue chez Illoa, une PME tunisienne créée en 2022, dédiée à l'art de la papeterie et à l'innovation dans le monde des jeux de grattage. Notre mission est claire : nous sommes à la pointe de la fabrication de papeterie de qualité tout en développant des solutions B2B passionnantes pour les jeux de grattage.

Nous sommes fiers de vous présenter une gamme de produits qui comprend des jeux de cartes à gratter uniques et des jeux promotionnels captivants, conçus pour divertir et exciter. Chez Illoa, nous croyons en la puissance de la créativité et de l'amusement, et c'est ce que nous apportons à chaque produit que nous créons.

Notre vision nous conduit vers le marché africain, où nous cherchons à établir une présence significative et à répondre aux besoins en constante évolution de nos clients. Nous sommes résolus à devenir des acteurs majeurs de l'industrie du jeu de grattage en Afrique, en proposant des solutions novatrices et en offrant une expérience inégalée.

Chez Illoa, notre culture d'entreprise repose sur le travail acharné et l'engagement envers l'excellence. Nous nous efforçons de satisfaire nos futurs partenaires en leur offrant des solutions adaptées qui répondent à leurs besoins spécifiques, le tout à un coût abordable. Pour nous, "solution adaptée et pas chère" ne sont pas des promesses vides, mais un engagement que nous honorons chaque jour.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre voyage alors que nous explorons de nouvelles frontières de l'excitation, de la créativité et de l'innovation dans le monde des jeux de grattage. Chez Illoa, nous créons l'amusement, nous créons l'avenir.

Name: Prim Pulp and Paper
Description:
Prim Pulp and Paper is a trailblazer in the pulp and paper industry, offering high-quality, sustainable products and expert services. We specialize in manufacturing premium pulp, paper and eco-friendly paper bags, all crafted with precision and a commitment to environmental responsibility.
Beyond production, we empower small businesses and entrepreneurs through comprehensive training programs, equipping them with the knowledge and skills to succeed in the paper industry. For established manufacturers, we provide tailored consultancy services, offering expert advice on optimizing production processes, enhancing product quality, improving efficiency, and adopting sustainable practices.
At Prim Pulp and Paper, we are dedicated to driving growth, innovation, and sustainability across the entire paper value chain from raw materials to finished products. Whether you're a start-up or an experienced manufacturer, we’re here to support your journey with supreme quality, expertise, and a shared vision for a greener future.
Why Choose Us?
•	Pulp and paper production from non-wood biomass like sugarcane bagasse, bamboo, and sisal fibre.
•	Eco-friendly pulp and paper production methods.
•	Expertise in handmade paper production processes.
•	Specialization in paper bag manufacturing.
•	Green supply chain analysis for sustainable raw material sourcing.
•	Manufacturing of pulp and paper machinery.
•	High level expertise 
Choose Prim Pulp and Paper for innovative solutions, sustainable practices, and a partner committed to your success.

Name: Flexlink LLC
Description:
Flexlink is a premier technical provider of highly-engineered advanced flexible materials, designed to enhance product performance and longevity in critical, high-cost-of-failure applications.

We specialize in custom-formulated woven & non-woven barrier materials, crafted for diverse, high-stakes industries. Our key product categories include:

- Precision Interleaving & Protective Packaging: Safeguarding metal, glass, and plastic components.
- Durable Substrates for Identification & Traceability: Robust base materials for tags and labels.
- Specialty Materials for Flame Retardant Applications: Advanced solutions for heat resistance and fire safety.
- High-Performance Flexible & Industrial Packaging: Superior barrier properties for a wide array of applications.
- Food & Beverage Filters and Production Material: Specialized solutions enhancing purity, quality and production efficiency.

We serve a broad spectrum of critical sectors:

- Advanced Manufacturing: Aerospace, automotive, consumer electronics.
- High-Tech Industries: Battery manufacturers, cutting-edge technology.
- And beyond: Any industry requiring custom-engineered material solutions.

Overcoming Your Material Challenges:

- Complex Material Requirements? Our global network of paper mills, specialty material production facilities, and expert engineers delivers unparalleled technical development of innovative solutions tailored to your unique challenges - all backed by best-in-class customer service.

- Supply Chain Inefficiencies? Our strategic onshore warehousing and Just-In-Time (JIT) delivery services ensure seamless, continuous supply of specialty materials. Combined with our nationwide network of converters, we optimize your barrier material supply chain, improving efficiency by minimizing overhead.

At Flexlink, we thrive on innovation. Partner with us to explore how our advanced barrier material expertise can elevate your product's performance, enhance longevity, and secure your market advantage.

Name: Feran
Description:
En Feran llevamos desde 1957 impulsando a librerías y papelerías únicas.

Somos especialistas en libros, juegos y material de papelería, y conectamos historias, aprendizaje y diversión con comercios de toda España. Desde esa entrañable papelería de barrio hasta grandes cuentas que lideran el sector, trabajamos contigo para que tu negocio marque la diferencia.  

Un equipo joven con la experiencia de toda una vida.

Más de 60 años nos han convertido en una pequeña gran familia, comprometida contigo y con el éxito de tu comercio. Entendemos tus necesidades porque, como tú, sabemos que cada detalle importa. Nuestra misión es hacer las cosas fáciles, cercanas y, sobre todo, ayudarte a destacar con una selección única que haga que tus clientes siempre quieran volver.  

Tu socio en cultura, creatividad y aprendizaje.

Cada librería y papelería tiene su esencia, y en Feran sabemos cómo potenciarla. Ofrecemos un surtido pensado para ti: desde ese libro que todo el mundo busca, pasando por joyas de la literatura infantil, imprescindibles de fondo cultural o el libro de texto más actual, hasta materiales de papelería y juguetes educativos que marcan la diferencia.  

Miles de títulos, un servicio excepcional.

Con stock inmediato, un catálogo amplio y diverso, y un servicio logístico que asegura entregas en menos de 24 horas en toda la península, Feran está aquí para facilitarte todo lo que necesitas para que tu comercio sea tan auténtico y especial como el día que abriste las puertas a tus clientes por primera vez. Porque sabemos que cada pedido es más que eso: es una oportunidad para hacer transmitir tu esencia y conquistar a tus clientes.
Location: San Sebastián de los Reyes, Community of Madrid
