Name: Corrugados Altavista
Description:
En Corrugados Altavista, transformamos sus necesidades de empaque en soluciones efectivas y eficientes. Nuestros productos de cartón corrugado, perfectos para comercio, industria y sector agrícola, le brindan seguridad y confianza, respaldados por una impecable tasa de entrega a tiempo del 98.5%. Esta eficiencia se traduce en confiabilidad para su cadena de suministro, asegurando que sus productos estén protegidos y listos para su distribución sin demoras.

Con capacidad para ampliar producción según la demanda, le ofrecemos la agilidad necesaria para responder a los mercados dinámicos. Nuestra constante inversión en tecnología y almacenamiento garantiza la disponibilidad de su empaque, con amplios inventarios y procesos que se ajustan a sus plazos y requisitos.

Nuestras avanzadas impresoras flexo folder-gluer le permiten personalizar su empaque con calidad de impresión de cuatro colores, destacando su marca en cada producto. El mantenimiento de altos inventarios de materia prima refleja nuestro compromiso con su éxito: aseguramos la continuidad y el abastecimiento oportuno, para que nunca se enfrente a un retraso en su producción por falta de empaques.

Con Corrugados Altavista, no solo adquiere un proveedor, sino un socio estratégico comprometido con la sostenibilidad, la calidad y la innovación, listo para impulsar el crecimiento de su negocio en Costa Rica y más allá

Whether you run a printing company, packaging business, offset printing, office supplies store, stationery store, or any other enterprise that requires paper, we have you covered. We offer a comprehensive range of paper based on GSM, type, size, and weight to meet your specific needs. 

We supply all types of paper ranging from but not limited to book printing, newspaper printing, office printing, chart paper, bond paper, coted paper, demy paper, crown paper, maplitho paper, paper roll, colour paper, home-use paper, packing carton paper, food-grade packaging, etc. (Subject to availability)

We take pride in our exceptional customer service. Our experienced team is always ready to assist you in finding the right paper solutions, answering your questions, and providing timely support throughout the entire order-to-delivery process. We understand the importance of efficient logistics, and we work tirelessly to ensure prompt delivery of your bulk paper orders.

Together, let's transform your paper requirements into a seamless and successful experience. Get in touch with us for all your wholesale paper requirements.

Name: Félix A. Medoro S.A.
Description:
Empresa líder en producción y distribución de sobres, sobres bolsa, rollos de papel y artículos de papelería comercial. Medoro es una empresa de origen, capital y gerenciamiento argentinos nacida en el año 1937. A lo largo de todos estos años, la empresa vivió todas las transformaciones del sector gráfico y del país, adaptándose a los cambios, innovando y apostandose a las nuevas tecnologías.

Desde sus inicios se caracterizó por la producción y distribución de sobres y sobres bolsa; su intachable trayectoria la posicionó como líder del mercado.

Con el correr de los años incursionó en otras áreas tales como la fabricación de rollos de papel y artículos de papelería comercial, donde logra sinergia de producción y comercialización con sus clientes.

Actualmente la planta de fabricación y oficinas ocupan 8.000 m² en la localidad de San Martín, Provincia de Buenos Aires. Equipada con maquinaria moderna y de alta tecnología, la empresa está diseñada para ofrecer una solución integral de papel para el armado de piezas postales, artículos de papelería comercial y soluciones gráficas.

La amplia variedad de artículos que ofrece y la incorporación de nuevos productos refuerzan la idea de sus fundadores de generar una estructura dinámica que pueda adaptarse a las necesidades del mercado actual. En este sentido se han incorporado las certificaciones del Forest Stewardship Council* , mejor conocida como FSC* a sus procesos productivos y papel Pro-Yungas, derivado de la caña de azúcar, renovando el compromiso con el medio ambiente y la sociedad.

Medoro, es un emblema de empresa en expansión, con una filosofía altamente inversionista que le permite generar una importante producción y distribución en todos los rincones del país y países limítrofes.

Todos los que hacemos Medoro estamos orgullosos de formar parte y nos esforzamos cada día por brindar una mejor atención con el profesionalismo que nos caracteriza.

*FSC - C107325

Name: Ikonos Media Factory

Our coating and laminating line is capable of producing various products and thus we are open to suggestions of our customers. Our location (middle of Europe) guarantees short delivery time. In our offer there are materials such as various types of glass decoration films, wallpapers, canvases, One Way Vision films, Backlits, Blockouts, Photo Papers, self-adhesive monomeric and polymeric PVC films (mat, semi-gloss and gloss, with grey, transparent or removable adhesive), laminating films, sandblasting PVC masks, etc. Our most important advantages are continuity of production and constant & solid quality, which we have achieved thanks to our know-how, qualified workers, long years of experiences and dedication also being open to the market needs. Our mission, our vision Our company’s crucial goals are: to supply the most modern and complex large format printing solutions, to form long-lasting business relationships with our customers, to adjust to the market’s demands, continuous development, Well-qualified, motivated employees, the most modern equipment, exploitable materials and international-wide range are our distinguishing marks. We are a dynamic company that is independent from outside investors. Being independent, flexible, as well as being in constant development are the main pillars of our company’s philosophy. We aim at being a leader Brand in LFP media production and distribution. Being a leader means: offering more than others, constantly raising the bar, raising standards, being competitive, reliable, caring and ambitious, to emanate optimism.

Saygıdeğer LinkedIn Topluluğu,

Can Barkod Ambalaj ve Dış Ticaret A.Ş. olarak, endüstriyel ambalaj çözümlerinde uzun yıllara dayanan deneyimimizle öne çıkıyoruz. Müşterilerimize işlerini kolaylaştıran, verimliliği artıran ve güvenilirliği en üst seviyede tutan çözümler sunarak değer katıyoruz.

İş ortakları olarak, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını anlamak ve onlara özel çözümler sunmak için çaba harcıyoruz. Geniş bir ürün yelpazesi sunarak, müşterilerimizin ambalaj ihtiyaçlarını eksiksiz bir şekilde karşılıyoruz. Kaliteli ambalaj malzemelerimiz ve çözümlerimizle, müşterilerimizin işlerini daha verimli hale getirmelerine yardımcı oluyoruz.

Can Barkod Ambalaj ve Dış Ticaret A.Ş. olarak, iş ortaklarımızın başarısı bizim başarımızdır. Siz de bize katılarak, işinizin ambalaj ihtiyaçlarını en üst düzeyde karşılamamıza destek olun.

Bizimle birlikte çalışın ve işinizin potansiyelini tam olarak gerçekleştirin!

Papir doo je porodična firma sa tradicijom dugom preko 30 godina. Bavimo se proizvodnjom kartonskih kutija i transportne amabalaže. Sedište firme i proizvodni pogon nalaze se u Laćarku, nadomak Sremske Mitrovice, 75 km od Beograda.

U našem pogonu vrši se proizvodnja svih vrsta kartonske ambalaže i kutija, transportnih i komercijalnih. Naši kupci se bave najrazličitijim delatnostima, od proizvodnje I pakovanja hrane I pića, preko obuće I odeće, do metalne I plastične galanterije. Dimenzije, oblik, i kvalitet kutije kao dizajn štampe u potpunosti prilagođavamo vašim potrebama i željama.

Ukoliko tek počinjete svoj biznis, naš tim je razume vaše potrebe, spreman je da proizvodi male serije i isprati rast obima vašeg posla. Tu smo da vas saslušamo, razumemo i zajedno kreiramo kutiju, pakovanje ili ambalazu koja ce savršeno odgovarati konceptu vašeg proizvoda.

Name: STUDIOthree
Description:
Welcome to our eco-friendly stationery brand, where every product is designed to help you build positive habits while staying mindful of the planet. We specialize in creating planners, calendars, notepads, and notebooks that inspire organization, creativity, and self-care in everyday routines.
Our collection is carefully handcrafted, with a commitment to sustainability and minimal environmental impact. We believe in the power of thoughtful design to help foster habits that make life more intentional and fulfilling. That’s why each item is made with eco-conscious materials and can be tailored to your unique needs, whether you’re ordering for personal use, gifting, or in bulk.
Choose from our range of personalized options to make your stationery truly yours. Let’s make planning an experience that aligns with your values, nurtures your goals, and brightens your day—one page at a time.

Name: Wenzhou Hongdan Office Supplies Co., Ltd.
Description:
Hongdan Office Supplies Co., Ltd. is located in Wenzhou, China which has been famous for its notebooks made of eco-friendly materials and with high-quality printing processes. FSC-certified papers are widely used by us to produce a variety of products such as journals, planners, calendars, etc.

The company was founded in 2007 when we started out primarily engaged on the early stage printing side before moving on to supplying manufacturing needs later down the road.

HDNOTEBOOKS.COM is your one-stop factory for notebooks and all things related to branding and packaging. We have years of experience in the industry, so our clients can be confident that we’ll provide them with everything they need from consultation to final production artwork.
Our brand has been well established in the domestic market for years, and we’re confident it’ll make waves internationally soon enough.

The international market is challenging for any company to break into. But we have confidence in our notebook products, and these figures witness how development has been going lately- would you like to join us on this journey?

We don’t see ourselves merely as a manufacturer, but rather like old friend who grows with your growth. We study side by side to develop custom notebooks that are beautiful and effective in meeting market needs while staying true to the brand identity you want for all of them

Name: VAJRA DIGITEX
Description:
Empowering Textile Innovation Through Sublimation Excellence.

VAJRA DIGITEX, a name synonymous with precision, performance, and purpose in the digital textile printing industry. Headquartered in Surat — India’s thriving textile capital — we specialize in delivering high-efficiency sublimation transfer paper rolls, engineered to meet the evolving demands of quality-driven fabric printing enterprises.

Who We Are:
We are not conventional manufacturers or traders — we are industry-focused sublimation specialists. With a deep-rooted understanding of the printing ecosystem, we curate and supply top-tier sublimation paper rolls to businesses who value consistent results, competitive pricing, and dependable service.

What We Offer:
Our product range is built to support large-volume output with flawless consistency, and is available in multiple GSM variants (29, 35, 45 GSM) and widths ranging from 36" to 72".

Each roll of sublimation paper is:
• Engineered for maximum ink absorption
• Optimized for rapid drying and clean transfer
• Designed with anti-ghosting and curl-resistant properties
• Compatible What We Offer

Applications include:
• Fashion & Sportswear Printing
• Custom Apparel & Accessories
• Home Décor & Interior Textiles

Name: Sri Krishna Digital Hub & Paper Mart
Hey, Stranger Greeting Cards
Description:
At Hey Stranger Greeting Cards, we're reinventing the way people connect through paper. Our exclusive, hand-drawn greeting cards merge quirky character design with sustainable practices, offering a fresh take on traditional correspondence.

We operate through two key channels: a curated quarterly subscription service that delivers exclusive designs directly to consumers' doorsteps, and wholesale distribution via Faire to boutiques nationwide. Every card in our collection is thoughtfully printed on FSC-certified paper, reflecting our commitment to environmental stewardship without compromising on quality.

Our passion lies in creating distinctive, memorable cards that help people maintain meaningful connections in an increasingly digital world. Whether you're a direct subscriber or a boutique owner, Hey Stranger offers access to designs you won't find anywhere else.

Connect with us to discover how we're making every greeting more meaningful, one card at a time.

#SustainableGreetings #HandDrawnDesign #CardSubscription #BoutiqueWholesale #EcoFriendly

Name: Fairdeal Paper Company
Description:
Fairdeal Paper Company has been committed to making paper affordable and accessible since April 25, 1991. With over 30 years of experience, we proudly serve as the exclusive distributor for BILT Graphic Paper Products Ltd. (Ballarpur Industries Ltd.) in Maharashtra. Our extensive product portfolio includes both coated and uncoated paper, designed to meet the evolving needs of our customers.

With a strong focus on reliability, timely delivery, and fair pricing, we strive to offer a seamless, customer-first experience at every touchpoint. Today, Fairdeal stands among India’s largest paper distributors, trusted by over 7,000+ customers and operating from two key locations—Shaniwar Peth (Pune) and Thane (Mumbai).

Our mission is simple: deliver quality paper and exceptional service, every single time.

Name: MD GLOBAL
Description:
MD Global is a leading international exporter specializing in a comprehensive range of disposable Foodservice Packaging and raw materials.

We partner with global distributors, wholesalers, and large-scale hospitality providers to deliver high-quality, competitively priced packaging solutions that meet the demands of modern commerce and sustainability.

 Our Core Export Range
We are your reliable, single source for a diverse product portfolio, covering both eco-friendly and essential packaging needs:

Categories & Key Products Exported	
Sustainable Tableware -	Plates, Bowls, Meal Trays, Clamshells, Cups, Containers	of Bagasse (Sugarcane Fiber) & Areca (Palm Leaf)

Paper Solutions - Single/Double/Ripple Wall Cups, Rectangular/Round Containers, PLA Straws & Lids, Cup Holders, Wrapping Paper, and Paper Rolls.

Food & Takeout Boxes - Pizza Boxes, Burger Boxes, Sandwich Boxes, Fries Boxes, Lunch Boxes, Flap Boxes, and Wok Boxes.	

Essential Containers - Essential containers for catering and heavy-duty food service of	Aluminum Foil

 Our Commitment to Sustainability & Service
At MD Global, we recognize the growing global shift towards environmental responsibility. We are committed to exporting solutions that reduce environmental impact through our extensive line of biodegradable and compostable products.

Why partner with MD Global?

Diverse Sourcing: A robust supply chain covering four primary packaging materials.
Quality Assurance: Rigorous quality control processes ensure all products meet international export standards.
Global Logistics: Expertise in handling large-volume logistics for seamless, on-time delivery worldwide.

 Let's Collaborate
We are actively expanding our global footprint and seeking reliable long-term distribution partners in all major markets. Connect with us to explore how MD Global can become your trusted supplier for the future of food packaging.
